visual_features.overall_style: Clean, modern medical website with a friendly pediatric tone. Uses a predominantly blue palette, flat design, large hero image, and a clear, corporate-but-approachable feel.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Primary hierarchy is established through size, color, and positioning: (1) Top logo + doctor name in bold blue at the upper left; (2) Full-width hero section featuring doctor’s photograph on the left and large name/title text on the right; (3) Primary CTA 'BOOK APPOINTMENT' in a high-contrast blue pill button in the bottom-right of the hero; (4) Secondary navigation items in the main menu bar with the active item highlighted in blue. Blue text and larger font sizes signal importance, while lighter gray/black text is secondary information.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Moderate to generous whitespace. Header bars are compact but not cramped; the main hero has ample breathing room around the portrait and title text with large paddings to the left/right. Navigation items are spaced out for easy scanning. There is clear vertical separation between the top info bar, main header/navigation, and hero section.
unique_elements: Circular pediatric logo with hand-drawn child faces and curved text ('Paeds Endo Care') positioned at top left.
Dual-header structure: a thin top information bar for contact/location and social icons, and a thicker main header for brand and navigation.
Hero section with a soft light-blue gradient background behind the doctor portrait and credentials.
Circular carousel navigation arrows on the left and right edges of the hero.
Prominent pill-shaped 'BOOK APPOINTMENT' CTA anchored in the lower-right corner of the hero.

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Implicit 12-column grid typical of Bootstrap-style layouts, with centered max-width content and margins on left/right.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Full-width top bars and hero section with a centered content container using a two-column hero (image left, text right). Global layout is a top navigation with content flowing vertically beneath.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: Top contact bar (email/phone/location + social icons) → main header with logo, doctor name, and horizontal navigation → hero content area with doctor image and textual credentials + CTA and carousel controls. Sections are horizontally full-width but visually constrained to a central column.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Left-aligned logo, doctor name, contact data, and hero text. Navigation items are centered or distributed across the header horizontally. Elements generally follow a strong left alignment, with the primary CTA aligned to the right edge of the hero text block.
responsive_hints: Central content container suggests fixed max-width with fluid width under it, suitable for responsive scaling.
Two-column hero (image + text) will likely stack to a single column on smaller screens, with the image above and text/CTA below.
Top info bar could collapse into stacked rows or hide some details on mobile.
Horizontal navigation likely condenses into a hamburger or slide-out menu on mobile; current spacing and number of items suggest this necessity.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow: (1) A slim full-width bar for contact information and social icons; (2) A main header band with logo on the far left, doctor’s name and credentials next, and a centered/right-aligned horizontal navigation menu; (3) A full-width hero section using a two-column layout: a large portrait of the doctor occupying the left ~40% and right ~60% dedicated to name, qualifications, and clinical affiliation, all on a soft gradient background. Carousel arrows are vertically centered on the far left and right of the hero, and the primary CTA pill button is placed at the bottom-right of the hero content.
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: Top info bar is shallow (approximately 8–10% of header height). The main header with logo and navigation takes moderate vertical space (roughly 15–20% of the above-the-fold area). The hero section occupies the majority (around 60–70% of the initial viewport height), dominated by the doctor portrait on the left and a generous textual block on the right. The CTA button and carousel controls take minimal space but are visually prominent due to color and shape.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Overall low-to-moderate density. Text lines are short and well spaced. Navigation items and header text do not feel crowded. Hero content uses large fonts, generous padding, and a large image, favoring clarity over information per pixel.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: Strong F-pattern / slight Z-pattern: the eye starts at the top-left contact email, moves right across phone/location and social icons, then drops to the left logo and doctor name, sweeps right across the navigation menu, then descends diagonally into the hero text 'Dr Divya Vilas Pujari' and supporting lines. The portrait on the left anchors attention and draws the eye, while the bright blue CTA at the lower right of the hero is a final focal point.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Primary CTA buttons are pill-shaped with fully rounded corners (border-radius ~999px), solid filled in a saturated blue (#2458C6–#2F5ECF), white uppercase or semi-uppercase text, and possibly a small white icon on the left. They have generous horizontal padding (approx. 16–24px) and moderate vertical padding (8–12px). Carousel controls are circular buttons with solid blue fills and white chevron icons, visually matching primary buttons but in a perfect circle.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Likely implemented as <a> elements styled as buttons (for navigation/appointment links) or <button> elements with class-based styling. Carousel arrows likely use <button> or <a> with an inner <i> or <span> for the chevron icon. Primary buttons may include an inline SVG or icon font span preceding the text.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Not explicitly visible in this hero snapshot, but the design language suggests simple, flat cards with subtle borders or very light shadows: rectangular with slightly rounded corners (4–8px radius), white background, 16–24px internal padding, and content stacked vertically (icon/heading/text/CTA). Borders are probably light gray (#E0E4EC) for separation.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Expected pattern: a containing <div class="card"> with optional <div class="card-header"> (for title or icon) and <div class="card-body"> with text and small CTA links or buttons. Cards are likely arranged in responsive grid rows (e.g., flexbox or Bootstrap columns).

ui_patterns.visual_description: Forms are not visible in this view; however, based on the overall style, inputs are expected to be full-width fields with light gray borders (#D0D4DD), 4px border-radius, white backgrounds, and clear labels positioned above the fields. Focus states likely use blue border or glow. Validation messages probably appear in small red text beneath the fields.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Typical stacked layout using <form> with block-level <div class="form-group"> wrappers. Inside each group, a <label> sits above an <input> or <textarea>. Submit buttons follow the primary pill-shaped button style. For multi-column forms on desktop, fields may be grouped in .row with column classes for side-by-side inputs.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Main navigation is a horizontal menu bar: plain text links with ample left-right spacing, likely uppercase or title case sans-serif, dark gray/black for default state and blue for active/hover. The active 'Home' item is highlighted in blue (#2458C6) and may also be bold. Background is white for the main header; the very top info bar uses a solid dark blue background with white icons and text. Social media icons are circular or simple icon-only elements aligned to the top-right.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Likely a semantic <nav> element containing a <ul> with <li><a> items. The active page uses a class such as .active that applies the blue color. Top info bar may use flexbox for distributing contact info on the left and social icons on the right. On mobile, navigation would be converted to a collapsed menu with a toggle button.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Lists in this header context appear as inline horizontal lists (navigation and contact details). Items are spaced with consistent gaps; in the nav, there are no visible vertical separators, relying instead on spacing and hover color changes. Contact details combine small icons (mail, phone, pin) with text, forming compact 'media object' items.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Navigation and contact items likely use <ul><li> markup with flexbox for horizontal layouts. Each contact item pairs an <i> or <span class="icon"> with an adjacent <span> for text. Future service listings on the site would probably use similar list or grid patterns with icons/thumbnails on the left and text on the right.

heading.visual_style: Bold geometric/humanist sans-serif with clean straight lines, moderate x-height, and slightly wide letterforms. Doctor’s name appears in uppercase or small caps with strong weight, conveying professionalism.

body.visual_style: Clean, neutral sans-serif suitable for medical content — legible, low-contrast strokes, and friendly but not ornamental.

spacing_system.component_padding: Typical interactive components (buttons, inputs, nav items) use 8–16px vertical and 16–24px horizontal padding. Cards and hero text blocks use ~24px internal padding.
spacing_system.section_margin: Vertical spacing between major sections (top bar to header, header to hero, hero to subsequent sections) is approximately 32–64px, giving clear sectional separation.

interaction_hints: Navigation links likely change text color from dark gray to primary blue on hover, possibly with a subtle underline or weight change.
Primary buttons likely darken slightly or add a subtle shadow on hover, with smooth 150–250ms transitions on background-color and box-shadow.
Carousel arrow buttons on the hero probably show a slight scale-up or background darkening on hover, and maybe a focus ring for accessibility when tabbed.
Top-bar social icons may change background or icon color on hover to reinforce clickability.
Smooth scrolling or fade-in transitions between hero slides and sections would match the calm, professional tone of the clinic brand.
